Off Calendar Nov-17-2008 Select Panel Of Arbitrators

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection Of Documents
Off Calendar Nov-05-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendants' Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Demand For Inspection Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $175, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2008 Assigned To Arbitration On Nov-17-08; Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference On Jan-06-09 At 09:00 A.M.
